title: ego lite: I gave Claude Code & Codex a browser to run web automation — here's what happened
summary: ego lite is a Chromium-based browser that provides AI agents with isolated workspaces for web automation without disrupting user browsing. It enables agents like Claude and Codex to compose browser workflows using JavaScript and includes semantic webpage snapshots for complex UI navigation.
writeup: The video demonstrates ego lite, a Chromium-based browser that gives AI agents isolated workspaces for web automation so their actions stay separate from normal browsing. It connects to AI coding tools including Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor, and exposes a code-based API alongside semantic page snapshots and Chrome data migration. The walkthrough centers on wiring these agents to a browser and showing how the automation runs in practice.
